title: Her First Beau
writer: Gladys Lehman, Karen DeWolf, Florence Ryerson
actors: Jane Withers, Jackie Cooper, Edith Fellows
plot: 15-year-old Penelope (Penny) Wood has two great interests - Chuck Harris and the hope that some day she might become a famous,great writer. Chuck also has two interests - his home-made glider and the hope that some day he will go ...
